channel.title: Volatility on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Volatility on Classroom

item.title: Try Hack me Room Volatility
item.description: TryHackMe Room Volatility walkthrough with step-by-step solutions — enumeration, exploitation, and privilege escalation on the Room Volatility challenge room.

item.title: Volatility Installation in Linux
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing Volatility 2 on Linux for memory forensics, including dependencies, Python setup, and verification.
